name: Evidence Interfaces Shape How Retrieval-Augmented Readers Use Support
summary: arXiv:2607.17108v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: In multi-hop RAG evaluation, a top-k answer score can hide two different failures: the retrieval window may drop part of the support chain, or it may...
description: arXiv:2607.17108v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: In multi-hop RAG evaluation, a top-k answer score can hide two different failures: the retrieval window may drop part of the support chain, or it may contain support in a form the adapted reader does not use well. We call this reader-facing form of retrieved evidence an evidence interface. Using three support-annotated multi-hop QA benchmarks, we...
author: Junchi Liao, Jiawen Deng, Fuji Ren
